item.title: About
item.description: About Me Algebraist working on issues in software architecture to make javascript fault tolerant. 2016 - 2020 npm install remotemon npm install valleydate npm install hoplon Career Interactive NOVEMBER 2015 - May 2016, London, UK ⚫️ material design ⚫️ mithril.js 🔴 javascript ⚫️ CSS Bristol Robotics Laboratory OCTOBER 2014 - FEBRUARY 2015, Bristol, UK ⚫️ ABB IRL Series Industrial Arm ⚫️ RAPID programming ⚫️ IronPython/C# ⚫️ computer vision
